data.title: Truckers face challenges with Trump's new 25% tariff on heavy trucks and parts, set for next month. Companies lack policy specifics.
data.description: Next month, a 25% tax will be implemented on heavy-duty trucks and their components. Unfortunately, companies are lacking specific information regarding this policy change.

data.title: Delta and United lead airline profits in 2022. Catering to affluent travelers may pose risks during economic downturns.
data.description: The airline industry has seen its profits primarily driven by Delta Air Lines and United Airlines since 2022. These two companies have been successful in attracting wealthier travelers. However, there is a concern that this reliance on high-end clientele could pose a risk if there is a downturn in the economy. The data shows that these two airlines have been key players in generating industry profits, raising questions about their vulnerability to economic fluctuations.

data.title: Level Access awarded Leader in Forrester's Digital Accessibility Platforms, Q4 2025 due to new AI capabilities.
data.description: In Stafford, Va., Level Access, a leading global provider of digital accessibility solutions, was recognized as a Leader in Forrester Research, Inc.’s assessment of digital accessibility platforms: The Forrester Wave™: Digital Accessibility Platforms, Q4 2025. This acknowledgment comes after the company introduced advanced AI agents and features to assist businesses in developing inclusive digital experiences for all users, including those with disabilities. This reaffirms Level Access's commitment to enhancing accessibility on a larger scale.

data.title: TailorCare's Impact Report shows improved outcomes in musculoskeletal care, saving costs with a personalized model.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, TailorCare, a top provider of value-based specialty care solutions for musculoskeletal (MSK) health, unveiled its 2024–2025 Impact Report. The report highlights notable enhancements in patient outcomes, cost savings, and the expandable provision of evidence-based care. MSK issues like arthritis, osteoporosis, and joint disorders impact almost half of Americans, with costs exceeding $420 billion annually in the U.S. TailorCare utilizes a personalized, risk-bearing approach to aid.
